nasb.text: Against whom do you jest? Against whom do you open wide your mouth And stick out your tongue? Are you not children of rebellion, Offspring of deceit,

esv.text: Whom are you mocking? Against whom do you open your mouth wide and stick out your tongue? Are you not children of transgression, the offspring of deceit,

cnv.text: 你們戲弄誰呢？ 你們張大嘴巴， 伸長舌頭戲弄誰呢？ 你們不是悖逆的孩子嗎？ 不是虛謊的後裔嗎？

ccb.text: 你们在嘲笑谁， 向谁吐舌头呢？ 你们难道不是悖逆的儿女、 诡诈的子孙吗？

csbs.text: 你们在嘲笑谁呢？ 向谁张大嘴巴、伸长舌头呢？ 难道你们不是过犯之子、虚谎之种吗？
